title: Delhi heritage sites: Supreme Court issues contempt notice to Archaeological Survey of India
description: The Supreme Court recently issued a contempt of court notice to the Director General (DG) of the Archaeological Survey of India for failing to file a status report on the condition of 173 protected monuments in Delhi.  [Rajeev Suri vs the Archaeological Survey of India & ors ]A Bench of Justices Ahsanuddin Amanullah and N Kotiswar Singh said the failure was a “deliberate violation” of its earlier order.It thus directed the DG to appear in person and explain why contempt action should no
